mapper.sql: SELECT p.*, c.id AS cat_id, c.name AS cat_name, c.description AS cat_desc, pv.price, pv.sale_price, pv.stock, pv.cpu, pv.ram, pv.storage, pv.screen, pv.specifications as variant_specs FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON pv.id = ( SELECT MIN(id) FROM product_variants pv2 WHERE pv2.product_id = p.id AND pv2.deleted = 0 )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products p
AND (p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.brand LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND p.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND p.brand LIKE CONCAT('%', #{brand}, '%')
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM product_variants pv WHERE pv.product_id = p.id AND pv.deleted = 0 AND pv.cpu LIKE CONCAT('%', #{cpu}, '%') AND pv.ram LIKE CONCAT('%', #{ram}, '%') AND pv.storage LIKE CONCAT('%', #{storage}, '%') AND pv.price >= #{minPrice} AND pv.price <= #{maxPrice} )
AND p.deleted = 0
SELECT DISTINCT brand FROM products WHERE deleted = 0 AND brand IS NOT NULL AND brand != '' ORDER BY brand ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM products WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (name, category_id, description, image_url, brand, status, content, deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, #{brand}, #{status}, #{content}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET name = #{name}, category_id = #{categoryId}, description = #{description}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, brand = #{brand}, content = #{content}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE products SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
